daily.title: Time for your one thing
daily.body: Check in for today and keep your streak alive.

meta.title: OneThing — Focus on one goal
meta.description: An OKR app for the one goal that matters most. Track daily actions, build streaks, and ship what counts.

hero.title: One goal. Every day.
hero.tagline: OneThing keeps you locked on the single thing that matters most — with OKRs, daily actions, and a streak that rewards showing up.
hero.trust: No credit card to start · Cancel anytime

focus.title: Only one goal at a time
focus.body: No endless backlog. Choose the one thing you'll move forward today, and the rest gets quiet.

okr.title: Measure what matters
okr.body: Turn your goal into 2–5 numeric targets. Know at a glance whether you're actually winning.

streak.title: Show up, every day
streak.body: A daily check-in, a growing heatmap, and a streak that makes showing up the easy choice.

mockup.title: Your day, on one screen
mockup.body: Open OneThing and see exactly what today looks like — your goal, your progress, and the actions that move the needle.
mockup.bullet1: A single goal with 2–5 measurable targets
mockup.bullet2: Daily actions you can tick off in one tap
mockup.bullet3: A 365-day heatmap that tells the story

pricingPreview.title: Simple pricing
pricingPreview.body: One flat plan. Monthly or annual — whichever fits you.

finalCta.title: Ready to ship your one thing?
finalCta.body: Start your 14-day free trial. No card needed.

meta.title: Pricing — OneThing
meta.description: Simple, flat pricing for OneThing. $3.99/month or $24.99/year. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: One plan with everything. Choose monthly or annual — cancel any time from Settings.
pricing.trial: 14 days free. No credit card to start.

features.heading: Everything included
features.f1: One active goal with 2–5 measurable targets
features.f5: Emotional nudges tuned to your progress
features.f6: English and Korean, light and dark themes
features.f7: Daily email reminder at your chosen time

pricing.guarantee: 7-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.

cookies.title: Cookie notice
cookies.message: We use a single essential cookie to keep you signed in. Analytics is cookieless.

today.title: Today
today.editCurrentHint: Tap the number to log today's value

messages.0_10: Every journey begins with one step
messages.51_75: You can see the finish line

goal.label: My Goal
goal.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Reach 70 kg, Score 900 on TOEIC
goal.actionPlaceholder: A small action to do daily
goal.goalTitlePlaceholder: What do you want to achieve?
goal.deleteGoalBody: All targets, actions, and check-in history will be deleted along with it. This cannot be undone.
goal.deleteTargetBody: Actions and check-in history under this target will also be deleted.
goal.deleteActionBody: Its check-in history will also be deleted.
goal.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteBody: This schedules your account and data for deletion within 30 days. You will be signed out immediately.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: Your goal, targets, actions and activity will be permanently removed within 30 days. This cannot be undone.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to continue your one goal.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start your 14-day free trial.
signup.displayNamePlaceholder: What should we call you? (e.g. Alex)
signup.ageCheck: I confirm I'm 14 years or older.
signup.termsCheck: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

welcome.title: How OneThing is different
welcome.body: Not a grand plan — one goal, split into three layers you actually run every day.

pillars.goalBody: The one thing you truly want. Give it a timeframe so it becomes a promise.
pillars.targetBody: 2–5 numbers that prove you're winning. No more hand-waving.
pillars.actionBody: Tiny daily moves you can check off. One square a day is enough.

goal.title: Pick the one thing that matters
goal.body: Write down the single thing you want to focus on right now. Not too big, not too small.
goal.titlePlaceholder: Write the goal you truly want to reach
goal.descriptionPlaceholder: One line on why this matters to you
goal.periodHint: Decide when it starts and ends. Default is today through 90 days from now.
goal.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.

targets.title: Prove success with numbers
targets.body: Pick 2–5 numeric checkpoints. Just say the current value and the goal value.
targets.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Reach 70 kg, Score 900 on TOEIC
targets.hint: If the current number is fuzzy, leave it blank. You can edit any time.

actions.title: Decide what you'll do each day
actions.body: For each target, stack small daily actions as cards. Small enough to still check off on a bad day.
actions.hint: Smaller is better. Size them so you can start within 2 minutes.

reminder.title: A quiet nudge, once a day
reminder.body: Pick one check-in time. We'll send a short email to remind you.

trial.title: You're all set
trial.body: Full access to OneThing Pro for 14 days. No card required.
trial.cardLater: You can add a card later from Settings.
